name: Don Knotts
blurb: The jittery genius behind Barney Fife.
bio: Don Knotts (1924-2006) was an American comedian and actor who first broke through with a 'nervous man' character on The Steve Allen Show, then won five Emmy Awards as the high-strung deputy Barney Fife on The Andy Griffith Show.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
